member.summary: Performance service local storage.

member.summary: Get a lock object by session.

member.name: T:Prime.PerformanceService.Internal.IPerformanceService
member.summary: Performance Service interface.

member.name: M:Prime.PerformanceService.Internal.IPerformanceService.GetGlobalInstanceSummaryMode(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the global instance summary mode.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Boolean value indicating whether test time summary or memory summary is enable.
member.remarks: If key is not found in SharedStorage service the method will return false.

member.name: M:Prime.PerformanceService.Internal.IPerformanceService.SetDeviceStartTime(System.DateTime,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Sets to the SharedStorage service an snapshot of the device start time in the format yyyyMMddHHmmss.
member.param: The start of the instance time.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.PerformanceService.Internal.IPerformanceService.SetDeviceEndTime(System.DateTime,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Sets to the SharedStorage service an snapshot of the device end time in the format yyyyMMddHHmmss.
member.param: The end of the instance time.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.PerformanceService.Internal.IPerformanceService.StartCurrentInstance(System.DateTime,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Starts the current instance and returns the pre-instance time and elapsed time from the start of the device.
member.param: The start of the instance time.
member.returns: A tuple containing the pre-instance time and elapsed time from the start of the device.
member.remarks: The returned tuple contains the following elements: - `PreInstanceTime`: This is the time elapsed between the end of the previous instance and the start of the current instance. It is measured in milliseconds. If there is no previous instance, this value will be 0. - `ElapsedTimeFromStartOfDevice`: This is the time elapsed from the start of the device to the start of the current instance. It is measured in milliseconds. If the device start time is not set or the device end time is set and is earlier than the device start time, this value will be 0.

member.name: M:Prime.PerformanceService.Internal.IPerformanceService.EndCurrentInstance(System.DateTime,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Marks the end of the current instance.
member.param: The end of the instance time.
member.remarks: This method should be called at the end of the Execute method to mark the end of the current instance. It updates the internal state of the PerformanceService to reflect that the current instance has ended.

member.name: T:Prime.PerformanceService.IPerformanceService
member.summary: Performance Service interface.

member.name: M:Prime.PerformanceService.IPerformanceService.GetCurrentInstanceElapsedTime(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the elapsed time from the start of the device to the start of the current test instance.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Value in milliseconds that represents the time that has passed since the start of the device to the start of the current test instance.

member.name: M:Prime.PerformanceService.IPerformanceService.GetDeviceSessionElapsedTime(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the elapsed time of the device session.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: The elapsed time of the device session in milliseconds. This is calculated from the start of the device session to the current time, or to the end of the session if it has ended.

member.name: M:Prime.PerformanceService.IPerformanceService.GetDeviceStartTime(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the device start time in a formatted string.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: String containing an snapshot of the device start time in the format: yyyyMMddHHmmss.

member.name: M:Prime.PerformanceService.IPerformanceService.GetDeviceEndTime(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the device end time in a formatted string.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: String containing an snapshot of the device end time in the format: yyyyMMddHHmmss.

member.name: M:Prime.PerformanceService.IPerformanceService.SetGlobalInstanceSummaryMode(System.Boolean,System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Sets the global instance summary mode into SharedStorageService.
member.param: Sets the mode of the test time summary.
Sets the mode of the memory summary. Default = false.
The session context of this operation.
member.remarks: When storing TRUE to test time summary and/or memory summary, test instance execute will print test time and/or memory summary to ituff.
